code:
import string
import io

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s) s
when None ""
end

mut best = ""
mut best_len = 0
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x) x
  when None 0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9
    let cl = string.len(current)
    if cl > best_len
      best_len = cl
      best = current
    end
    current = ""
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let cl = string.len(current)
if cl > best_len
  best_len = cl
  best = current
end

println("longest=#{best}")
